modules.sql: SELECT la.loan_id, la.customer_id, la.loan_type, la.current_balance, la.interest_rate, la.loan_status, cs_avg.avg_credit_score, CASE WHEN cs_avg.avg_credit_score >= 700 THEN 'Low Risk' WHEN cs_avg.avg_credit_score >= 650 THEN 'Medium Risk' WHEN cs_avg.avg_credit_score >= 550 THEN 'High Risk' WHEN cs_avg.avg_credit_score IS NOT NULL THEN 'Very High Risk' ELSE 'Unknown' END AS risk_tier, la.as_of FROM loan_accounts la LEFT JOIN (SELECT customer_id, AVG(score) AS avg_credit_score FROM credit_scores GROUP BY customer_id) cs_avg ON la.customer_id = cs_avg.customer_id
